原文: 按照下表将8人份和16人份建库试剂分装到对应的耗材中，不同装量试剂分装表参考附录6，将试剂放入建库仓以前，均需再次离心，确认管底没有气泡。
译文: Aliquot the 8-test and 16-test library preparation reagents into the corresponding consumables according to the table below; for aliquoting tables of different volumes, refer to Appendix 6. Before loading the reagents into the Library Preparation Module, centrifuge again to ensure there are no bubbles at the bottom of the tubes.

原文: 按照图7的将建库仓需要的试剂耗材摆放到指定位置，去掉枪头盒盖子，将试剂管盖打开，注意在Rack11定量模块放完八连管后，需合上定量模块的盖子。在Rack 8放完试剂后，需将温控盖板盖回Rack 8。
译文: As shown in Figure 7, place the reagents and consumables required by the Library Preparation Module at the designated positions. Remove the tip box lids and open the reagent tube caps. Note: after placing the 8-tube strips in the Rack 11 quantification module, close the lid of the quantification module. After placing the reagents in Rack 8, replace the temperature-control cover plate back onto Rack 8.
